_doc: Synthetic fixtures for export-pdf-wrongthread-external-close. Save Document as PDF faults with InvalidCastException / RPC_E_WRONG_THREAD (0x8001010E) because Word Application Scope attached to an already-open external WINWORD.EXE that the user closed mid-run before the export. The job log shows the attach warning + the mid-run-close warning; the workflow itself is structurally correct.

rules.match: or jobs list --folder-key a1b2c3d4-e5f6-4708-9a1b-2c3d4e5f6071 --state Faulted --output json
or jobs logs b2c3d4e5-f6a7-4819-8b2c-3d4e5f607182 --level Error --output json

rules._doc: Proxy open-ended docsai queries to the real uip CLI; cache results in _cache/.
